reasoning: All three core sectors (XLK, XLF, XLE) are moving within ±0.3%, indicating low dispersion and weak sector conviction. XLK (tech, -0.24%) and XLF (financials, -0.29%) are slightly negative while XLE (energy, +0.28%) is slightly positive — a hint of defensive/inflation rotation, but magnitudes too small for directional conviction. SPY is up 0.52% premarket, but this move is NOT confirmed by broad sector participation; tech and financials are lagging. Breadth is narrow (SPY outpacing all three major sectors), suggesting fragile rally. Sector picture offers no clear risk-on or risk-off signal.
key_observations: SPY: +0.52% premarket — outperforming all sectors, indicating narrow leadership without broad sector confirmation
Sector rotation: Very weak hint of defensive (energy up, tech/financials down), but magnitudes too small (< 0.3%) for actionable signal
Breadth: NARROW — SPY leading, sectors lagging. Premarket gap-up not yet confirmed by sector internals.
